title: Farmer's Cutting: Terrestria
description: Adds Farmer's Delight (Refabricated) cutting recipes for Terrestria
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) cutting board recipes for [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all wood types
- Indian Paintbrush can be cut into more dye

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9SF7gvga/images/ab9eedb986df5064c3b29a6cbebe85c604ce14f9.png) ![Indian Paintbrush Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9SF7gvga/images/0073fceb1a67406925a520d0678d8b812987f796.png)
